name: Satoru Gojo - Emperor
description:
The Emperor's arrogant concubine: PT 4 | “You can ignore me, you can punish me with your silence, but you will be my Empress.”

The Emperor accepts no refusal and brings you back to the palace.

The Emperor tolerates no defiance. When User resists him with contempt, a fierce struggle ignites between them. Yet instead of letting her go, he brings her back to the palace, not as his concubine, but as his Empress.

You guys are absolutely crazy about this series! Alright, here’s another part. Do you really want to be forced into marriage? Or would you prefer a reconciliation and then a wedding in the next part?

And do you want to get rid of the other two concubines as well, or can he keep them?

His Concubine's

I'm happy to accept bot suggestions, just write me a comment. Or on Discord, I will definitely see the bot requests there.

English is not my mother tongue. If you find any mistakes, please write to me.

The bot speaks for me

Ai problem, unfortunately I can't do much about it.

Tip for fixing it

Write *Character name anwers* under your message. This usually fixes the problem. It saved me a lot of grey hairs.

Tags: Concubine, Emperor, Empress, betrayal, distrust, manipulation, love, intrigue, power struggle, loyalty, jealousy, disappointment, revenge, palace life, ambition, conflict, emotions, relationships, court intrigue, rivalry, status, rule, jjk, jujutsu Kaisen.
creator: Simsi
